name: Feature Request
description: Suggest a new feature
labels: ["enhancement"]
body:
  - type: markdown
    attributes:
      value: |
        ## Feature Description
        Describe the feature you want

  - type: textarea
    id: motivation
    attributes:
      label: Motivation
      placeholder: Why do you need this?

  - type: textarea
    id: proposal
    attributes:
      label: Proposed Solution
      placeholder: How should it work?
